objective: Repair post-merge governance backlog drift after issue #382 closed while OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md still listed it under In Progress, and align the legacy backlog-sync entrypoint with the hardened active-row checker.
scope_boundary: Modify backlog/progress mirrors for issue #382 and issue #384 planning evidence.
Update the legacy backlog GitHub sync entrypoint so it delegates to the canonical Overlord backlog alignment checker.
Add focused unit coverage for the delegation path.
out_of_scope: Changing PR merge policy or branch protection rules.
Refreshing graph/wiki artifacts unless a gate explicitly requires it.
Cleaning unrelated stale worktrees or dirty sibling checkout state.
research_summary: Audit found PR #383 moved #382 into In Progress while the issue was open, CI passed, then GitHub closed #382 on merge. The hardened Overlord checker validates In Progress rows, but the dedicated backlog-sync entrypoint still used a legacy Planned-only checker.

sprints.name: Backlog drift repair
sprints.goal: Reconcile closed issue #382 out of active governance mirrors and remove the Planned-only checker gap in the named backlog-sync path.
tasks: Move #382 from active OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md and docs/PROGRESS.md sections to Done with PR #383 evidence.
Add issue #384 PDCAR and structured plan artifacts.
Validate locally with focused tests, backlog alignment, structured plan enforcement, execution-scope enforcement, and diff checks.
acceptance_criteria: No closed #382 reference remains in active backlog/progress sections.
Backlog alignment checker passes against the current tree.
The legacy backlog-sync entrypoint uses the hardened checker that validates both Planned and In Progress.
Governance-surface plan and execution-scope gates pass.

specialist_reviews.focus: Trace how issue #382 remained active after PR #383 merged and determine whether checker coverage should have prevented it.
specialist_reviews.summary: Confirmed the drift came from a rolling backlog update pattern plus post-merge issue closure timing, and identified the legacy Planned-only checker as a weaker workflow path.

alternate_model_review.summary: Accepted the minimal remediation: move #382 to Done and delegate the legacy backlog-sync entrypoint to the hardened active-row checker.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #384 may update backlog/progress mirrors, planning artifacts, execution scope, and backlog-sync checker wrapper/tests.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Apply the mirror repair and checker wrapper parity change, validate locally, then publish a PR.

material_deviation_rules: If validation requires broader workflow changes, split them into a separate issue-backed hardening slice.
If graph/wiki artifacts change only because of the worktree hook, exclude that generated noise from the repair patch.
If another closed issue appears in active sections, reconcile it in the same mirror repair only when it is part of the same acceptance path.
